title: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past Music Disc Pack
description: Nintendo Music Disc Series: VOLUME IV
body:
This Data and Resource Pack collection adds 21 craftable music discs from The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past.

### TRACKLIST
All track names are sourced from the Nintendo Music app. Songs have been sourced from the [Legend of Zelda: Sound & Drama](https://zeldawiki.wiki/wiki/The_Legend_of_Zelda:_Sound_%26_Drama) soundtrack release
- Title Theme
- Player Select
- Rainy Night
- Hyrule Castle
- Princess Zelda, Rescued
- Sanctuary
- Light World
- Kakariko Village
- Light World Dungeon
- Boss Theme
- Boss Defeated
- Lost World
- The Master Sword
- Agahnim's Theme
- Dark World
- Dark World Dungeon
- The Crystals
- Mountains and Forests of the Dark World
- Ganon Battle
- Triforce Room
- Ending Theme

### CRAFTING GUIDE
A smithing table is required to obtain discs added in these packs. The recipes are displayed in the Advancements tab, which unlocks when you obtain any Music Disc and an Ender Pearl. The Advancement tab shows a checklist of each song with the required *"addition"* item needed to obtain it as the Advancement icon.
